compiled_state.title: RED test: Add merge.ci_workflow_name auto-migration assertions
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add structural/metadata assertions to test-onboarding-skill.sh verifying SKILL.md contains merge.ci_workflow_name auto-migration logic.

### New Test Functions

1. **test_ci_workflow_name_deprecation_migration**: Assert SKILL.md contains auto-migration logic from merge.ci_workflow_name to ci.workflow_name, including conditional skip when ci.workflow_name already exists, and deprecation notice logging.

### TDD Requirement
Structural/metadata validation test. Must fail RED before SKILL.md changes.

### File Impact
- tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests pass (exit 0) after SKILL.md update
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh
- [ ] test_ci_workflow_name_deprecation_migration function exists
  Verify: grep -q "test_ci_workflow_name_deprecation_migration" tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh
- [ ] New assertion fails RED before SKILL.md changes
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL"
